channel.title: dotnet/AspNetCore.Docs Pull Requests
channel.description: Pull Requests from https://github.com/dotnet/AspNetCore.Docs, generated by https://github.com/meziantou/IssuesToRss/

item.title: PR: Merge to live - @Rick-Anderson
item.description:
<!-- # Instructions
When creating a new PR, please reference the issue number if there is one:
Fixes #Issue_Number
The "Fixes #nnn" syntax in the PR description allows GitHub to automatically close the issue when this PR is merged.
NOTE: This is a comment; please type your descriptions above or below it. -->

item.title: PR: removed implied comment - @bradygaster
item.description: Comment in prior to this edit implied that Redis would be only good for development and test, when in fact, Redis is great for production usage and we want to make sure we don't imply anything to the contrary.

item.title: PR: Versioning Test - @guardrex
item.description: Internal Review: Version 3.1 Internal Review: Version 5

item.title: PR: Add section about browser tabs sleeping - @BrennanConroy
item.description: Internal review link

item.title: PR: Catch JS interop exceptions - @guardrex
item.description:
Addresses #19286

Internal Review Topic (links to section)

item.title: PR: Null-check ElementReferences - @guardrex
item.description: Addresses #19286

item.title: PR: Binding select multiple - @guardrex
item.description:
Fixes #22448 Addresses #22448

HOLD FOR RELEASE OF PREVIEW 7

  • Internal Review Topic (Data Binding, links to section)
  • Internal Review Topic (Forms and Validation, links to section)

On the PR:

  • The multiple select feature for Preview 7 release. I'll hold this PR until Preview 7 comes out.
  • Moves the null binding behavior section from the Forms Validation topic to the Data Binding topic and cross-links to it from Forms Validation. Cross-links also from each topic's new multiple select feature coverage.

Question ❓:

For InputSelect, the multiple attribute is inferred when bound to an array type. However, the example for binding <select> doesn't exhibit the same setup in the PU repo sample ...

https://github.com/dotnet/aspnetcore/blob/main/src/Components/test/testassets/BasicTestApp/SelectVariantsComponent.razor

Is inferred multiple a thing for binding <select>, too, and the sample just doesn't show it? If so, I'll mirror the InputSelect coverage remark in the <select> coverage and probably modify the <select> coverage example to drop multiple in that scenario, too (i.e., let it infer the attribute as the InputSelect example does).

item.title: PR: Update web-api-javascript.md - @nubok
item.description:
There is a point

Add a CSS file named site.css to the wwwroot/css folder. Replace the contents of site.css with the following styles:

But at this point, no css folder has been created inside wwwroot.

item.title: PR: Update platform-specific-configuration.md - @smaicas
item.description: Remove "{" symbols affect to assembly detection when declared in IHostBuilder pipeline.

item.title: PR: Update index.md - @HamletHakobyan
item.description: Fixed setx command.

item.title: PR: Refactor approach on max file size - @guardrex
item.description:
Fixes #22703

Thanks @dustout! :rocket: ... Good news is that the topic already had the text to cover it ...

The maxAllowedSize parameter of OpenReadStream can be used to specify a larger size if required.

I just didn't implement what I wrote in the topic in the sample app! Did I have too much ???? ... Or, not enough!??

Thanks again for the catch. I'll merge this to the live doc immediately.

item.title: PR: docs: Fix typo in environment variable. - @adyavanapalli
item.description:
Summary

This patch renames the environment variable ASPNETCORE_Environment to ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT.

item.title: PR: Delete readme.md - @steveberdy
item.description:
Summary

Delete duplicate, outdated readme file for First Mongo App Tutorial.

Fixes #22704 @Rick-Anderson

item.title: PR: Fixed unreachable code error in file upload example - @dustout
item.description: Max file size check is limited to 500kb without specifying long.MaxValue in file.OpenReadStream

item.title: PR: Update http-context.md - @Rick-Anderson
item.description: @serpent5 please review

item.title: PR: Generic type support updates (including 6.0 updates) - @guardrex
item.description:
Fixes #17351 Addresses #22045

  • We're currently lacking some basic coverage in the Components overview for generic type params. This PR fixes that.
  • The new 6.0 feature that allows where constraints with standard C# syntax is included.
  • Improve cross-linking and lingo.

item.title: PR: Required Blazor parameters - @guardrex
item.description:
Fixes https://github.com/dotnet/AspNetCore.Docs/issues/22445 Addresses https://github.com/dotnet/AspNetCore.Docs/issues/22045

Internal Review Topic (links to section)

item.title: PR: Fix versioning - @guardrex
item.description:
Fixes #22692

Thanks @Allytrice! :rocket: ... The version range for 2.x only covers 2.1, so loading 2.2 breaks the topic. I'm setting it to <3.0, and that will do the trick.

item.title: PR: Use the automatic SignalR reconnect feature - @eluchsinger
item.description:
Warning: This code snippet is used as a Sample.

I am not sure, if the behavior stays the same after this change. For me it looks like the intent should be the same though.

Internal Review Topic (links to section)

  • Add the coverage for error boundaries.
  • While here, I want to move the Global exception handling heading into its INCLUDE file. It's just a nit update.

item.title: PR: Update first-mongo-app.md - @steveberdy
item.description:
Fixed links to MongoDB documentation. Documentation was moved, so links were updated to prevent "access denied" messages when accessing the old documentation URLs.

Fixes #21336 Fixes #22149

item.title: PR: Merge to live - @Rick-Anderson
item.description: Update new-field.md (#22682)

item.title: PR: Launching Blazor debugging proxy from UI extension - @guardrex
item.description:
Fixes #22443 Addresses #22045

Looks like we just need to version out the line that we added earlier ...

* Debug in non-local scenarios (for example, [Windows Subsystem for Linux (WSL)](/windows/wsl/) or [Visual Studio Codespaces](/visualstudio/codespaces/overview/what-is-vsonline)).

Note that the whole list must be versioned: This docs feature will if you try to do it on a single listitem.

Is there anything else for docs to cover Add support for launching DebugProxy from blazorwasm debug type in VS Code (dotnet/aspnetcore #22587)?
